security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Keep your Fable sessions on Fable.
bundle.longDescription: Counterspell watches your Claude Code sessions and returns drifted ones to their target model. This is the persistent control window: verdict, live roster, activation log, and arm/disarm controls.
